About Elfurat Spices

Built for purity, scale, and trust.

Elfurat Spices is a Delhi-headquartered global exporter of premium Indian FMCG ingredients - from farm-fresh whole spices to master-blended masalas, from Kashmiri saffron to Bihari fox nuts. We operate as a single accountable partner from field to freight, serving retail brands, HORECA groups, and industrial food manufacturers across 40+ countries.

Pillar

Authentic

Single-origin, single-lot traceability. No blending across regions unless a client requests it.

Pillar

Certified

APEDA, FSSAI, ISO 22000, FDA, and Spice Board of India registered - audit-ready at all times.

Pillar

Global

Export corridors into the US, UK, EU, GCC, ASEAN and Africa - with local partner networks in each.

Our Process

Six stages, one accountable partner.

1
Sourcing

Farmer collectives across India

We partner with 200+ farmer collectives across Kerala, Gujarat, Rajasthan, Kashmir, and the North-East to secure single-origin lots at peak season.

Cleaning

Sortex + de-stoning + magnetic separation

Every incoming lot passes through gravity separators, sortex color grading, and metal detectors before entering our processing floor.

2
3
Processing

Cold-milling to preserve essential oils

Cold-milling stations lock in volatile oil content that hot mills destroy - the difference between a shelf spice and an export-grade spice.

Quality Control

In-house lab testing for every lot

Moisture, ASTA color, volatile oil %, aflatoxin, pesticide residues - every lot ships with a full Certificate of Analysis.

4
5
Packaging

Export-grade lot-coded packaging

Bulk 25kg PP sacks with inner liners, nitrogen-flushed for oxygen-sensitive powders, and consumer-ready retail SKUs on demand.

Logistics

40+ countries, FCL & LCL ready

Direct partnerships with global freight forwarders; full documentation for APEDA, FSSAI, phytosanitary, and destination-country compliance.

6
Our Infrastructure

Warehousing, milling, and packing - under one certified roof.

Compliant with the world's strictest food standards.

APEDA
FSSAI
FDA
ISO
Spice Board of India

Elfurat Spices is a global exporter of premium Indian spices, aromatics, nuts and pantry staples - engineered for retail brands, HORECA and industrial food manufacturers worldwide.

APEDA FSSAI FDA ISO Spice Board of India
